C

cancelAllTasks() - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
This method cancels all running requests.
cancelAllTasks() - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method cancels all running requests.
com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service - package com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
connectToDeviceViaBluetooth(String, Context, BluetoothService.BluetoothDeviceConnectionCallback) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
Connects to device via Bluetooth.
connectToDeviceViaSoftAp(boolean, Context, String, SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
Connects to device via SoftAP wifi network being broadcast by the device.
